description: Initial or follow-up call with a buyer prospect

motivation_uncovered.description: Agent asks WHY the buyer wants to move — not just what they want. Understands the emotional driver.

timeline_established.description: Agent establishes a clear timeline and assesses urgency.

financial_qualification.description: Agent tactfully addresses pre-approval status and budget without making the client feel interrogated.

needs_vs_wants.description: Agent distinguishes between must-haves and nice-to-haves to set realistic expectations.

agent_value_explained.description: Agent explains what they do differently and why working exclusively with them benefits the buyer.

commitment_asked.description: Agent asks the buyer to commit to working exclusively or at minimum schedules a formal buyer consultation meeting.

active_listening.description: Agent reflects back what the buyer says, validates concerns, and does not dominate the conversation.

next_steps_confirmed.description: Clear next step confirmed — showing scheduled, listing sent, or follow-up call booked.
